atlas v0.5
Back To Use Cases

Use Case

Research / Knowledge System

适合研究报告、知识入口、设计系统与文档型网站。它需要可信、可扫描、可回访。

Primary Family

Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface

Structures

Archive StackDossier / Feature

Why This Fit Works

从任务反推视觉和结构

Content Shape

Dense modules, evidence blocks, topic navigation, layered depth.

User Goal

让读者快速找到论点、证据、导航入口和后续深挖路径。

Why

图表、证据、结论和导览要一起设计。

Avoid

  • 信息太薄却强行做复杂知识页
  • 没有章节与导航
  • 只有 mood 没有证据

Recommended Families

这个场景最适合借哪几条家族

Web Family

Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface

Thesis, evidence, navigation, and labels coexist. The page must remain trustworthy and scannable even when it gets dense.

Historical Roots

Bauhaus / Functional ModernismSwiss / International Typographic Style

Best For

research hubsdesign systemsguides
Open family
Web Family

Swiss Typographic Grid

Order-forward, grid-led, typographic systems for archives, references, identities, and anything that must stay legible while it grows.

Historical Roots

Swiss / International Typographic Style

Best For

archivesidentity studiosreference libraries
Open family

Prompt Packet

可以直接复制给 agent 的场景提示

Prompt Packet

Research / Knowledge System

Content type: Research / Knowledge System IA layer: Archive Stack / Dossier / Feature Visual family: Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface + Swiss Typographic Grid Reference packet: Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface / Swiss Typographic Grid Mood: 适合研究报告、知识入口、设计系统与文档型网站。它需要可信、可扫描、可回访。 Required traits: 让读者快速找到论点、证据、导航入口和后续深挖路径。 Avoid: 信息太薄却强行做复杂知识页 / 没有章节与导航 / 只有 mood 没有证据

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.

Updated 2026-03-30 · design.zondev.top
